response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, and native-level Japanese proficiency, while his extensive background is in web/mobile stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) with no evidence of embedded networking, security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X), or switch firmware development.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Extensive DevOps and CI/CD infrastructure experience
concerns: No proven experience with C in embedded UNIX environments
Zero indication of Linux kernel source-level modification or networking security expertise
Japanese language proficiency is absent (required native-level)
